author: pan4ratte
description: Allows you to post notes directly to Telegram channels, groups and personal messages with different presets and advanced publishing settings. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: pan4ratte
manifest.description: Allows you to post notes directly to Telegram channels, groups and personal messages with different presets and advanced publishing settings.
manifest.name: Publish to Telegram

name: Publish to Telegram

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Major update

Version 4.0.0 brings bots back with a more important purpose: a full support of rich-text messages feature, intorduced by Telegram on [June 11, 2026](https://telegram.org/blog/watch-apps-and-more/#obscenely-rich-text-formatting-for-bots) only for bots. This is the biggest formatting update in the history of Telegram, which is great news for writers and admins. For example, post symbol limit is 32.000 now. Moreover, we introduce multiple accounts and reusable bot tokens support. Now you can:

* **Post as a bot again.** The Bot API posting method is back, alongside accounts. Any preset can post as an account, as a bot with classic text formatting and completely new, heavily extended rich-text formatting. See user guide to learn, how to use bot features properly.
* **Post rich-text messages.** Bot presets can post using Telegram's Rich Messages: headings, tables, ordered and task lists, block quotes, collapsible blocks, footnotes, formulas, inline media and more. Pick the "Bot + rich text" method when creating a preset or in the advanced publishing settings later. One important limitation, *imposed by Telegram*: Rich Messages can accept only web-embedded media (HTTP/HTTPS links), local file attachments are not supported.
* **Send rich-text comments.** Pre-written comments are send with the same publication method as the post.
* **Add multiple accounts.** Authorize into more than one Telegram account and choose which one each preset posts from.
* **Save and reuse bot tokens.** Bot tokens are now stored securely in your Obsidian Keychain, can be named, and reused across multiple presets.
* **Send .md attachments as documents.** When the "Treat .md embeds as post comments" option is off, embedded .md files are attached to the post as documents.

Upgrading from 3.x should be seamless: your authorized account and presets carry over automatically — you don't need to log in again or rebuild your presets, and your previous account becomes the first entry in the new multiple-accounts list.

### UI/UX enhancements and bug fixes

* Authorization and preset cards were completely redesigned.
* READMEs and User guides were updated with full rich-text formatting documentation.
* Various markdown and API parsing fixes.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: * **Hotfix.** Fixed an bug when changelog and user guide were not opening.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### New features

* **Automatic scheduled posts links fetching.** If "Save posts links" option is enabled in the settings and you make a scheduled post, the plugin will create a task to fetch the link after publication. Fetching happens in two scenarios: when Obsidian is open on scheduled time or when you open Obsidian past scheduled time — the link is automatically fetched and inserted to the corresponding property.
* **Edit pre-written comments after publication.** Links to published comments are stored in the separate `tg_comments` property and after publication you can edit them with the advanced publishing settings menu. Note that `telegram_links` property was renamed to `tg_posts`: if you used "Save posts links" feature, be sure to rename already existing property with the Obsidian core plugin [Properties view](https://obsidian.md/help/plugins/properties).
* **View changelog.** Available to view in the settings, the user guide, or via the palette command. Changelog notification in the settings can be dismissed and will not appear until the next update.

### UI/UX enhancements and bug fixes

* New notifications that reflect post/comment editing process.
* Legacy auto-default preset feature removed. Now, if you have only one preset and try to post with the default option` and it is not set up, advanced publishing settings menu will open.
* GramJS `localStorage` API schema cache was disabled to avoid triggering linter issues.
* Fixed UI bugs in the advanced settings.
* Various markdown parsing fixes by @egorgvo.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Major 3.0.0 update

[ Текст на русском ниже ]

> Note: this 3.0.1 update is a security and stability hotfix. The rest of the changelog is from 3.0.0 update.

Version 3.0.0 of the plugin presents the biggest update since the beginning of development. The main change is migration from Bot API to User API with many enhancements. Now you can:

* Authorize into your Telegram account. No bot creation or any complex setup processes anymore!
* Post, using Telegram Premium features, if you have premium subscription. For example, send media attachments with text up to 4096 symbols (instead of 1024 with bots).
* Schedule posts in the advanced publishing settings. Just pick a date and send the post.
* Search and add multiple channels, groups, *forum topics*, chats and bots to one preset. Presets were completely rewritten. You can also add target chat by entering its @username or ID manually.

## UI/UX enhancements

* Plugin UI was generally cleaned up and restructured.
* New notifications that reflect posting process were added.
* Default preset feature updated: if no preset is set as the default, the Advanced publishing settings menu will open.
* Advanced publishing settings option was added to the context menu. 
* New error notification when an attempt to publish is made, but the user is not logged in.
* New error notification when an attempt to update the post is made, but no text was changed.
* READMEs and user guide are updated to reflect all changes and new features.

## Other

* Startup time was optimized.
* Locales are updated, corrected and cleaned up.
* Fixed a bug when video attachments were sent as GIFs.
* Fixed a bug when pre-written comments were not sent.
* Fixed a bug when "Media attachments below the text" feature didn't work.

Thanks to @egorgvo for his valuable backend contributions.
Thanks to @aevxofficial for the idea to add posting to forum topics feature.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/compare/3.0.0...3.0.1

---

## Глобальное обновление 3.0.0

> Обратите внимание: данное обновление 3.0.1 является патчем, улучшающим стабильность и безопасность плагина. Остальной список изменений относится к обновлению 3.0.0

Версия плагина 3.0.0 представляет собой крупнейшее обновление с начала разработки. Главное изменение заключается в миграции с Bot API на User API со многими улучшениями. Теперь вы можете:

* Авторизоваться в ваш Telegram-аккаунт. Больше никаких ботов и сложных процессов настройки!
* Постить, используя фичи Telegram Premium, если у вас есть премиум-подписка. Например, отправлять медиа-вложения с текстом до 4096 символов (вместо 1024, как было с ботами).
* Отправлять посты в отложенные в меню расширенной публикации. Просто выберите дату и отправьте пост.
* Искать и добавлять несколько каналов, групп, *тем в группах*, чатов и ботов в один пресет. Пресеты были полностью переписаны. Также, мы можете добавить целевой чат, введя его @username или ID вручную.

## UI/UX улучшения

* Интерфейс плагина был приведён в порядок и реструктурирован.
* Добавлены новые уведомления, отражающие процесс постинга.
* Обновлена функция постинга с пресетом по умолчанию: если пресет по умолчанию не установлен, открывается окно Расширенных настроек публикации.
* Опция Расширенных настроек публикации была добавлена в контекстное меню. 
* Новое уведомление об ошибке, когда делается попытка публикации без авторизации.
* Новое уведомление об ошибке, когда делается попытка обновить пост, но текст не был изменён.
* README-файлы и руководство пользователя были обновлены, чтобы отразить все изменения и новые функции.

## Другое

* Время запуска плагина было оптимизировано.
* Текст интерфейса и переводы были обновлены, подчищены и исправлены.
* Исправлен баг, когда видео-вложения отправлялись как GIF.
* Исправлен баг, когда заготовленные комментарии не отправлялись.
* Исправлен баг, когда функция "Вложения под текстом" не срабатывала.

Благодарность @egorgvo за его ценные бекенд-коммиты.
Спасибо @aevxofficial за идею добавить фичу постинга в темы групп.

**Полный лог изменений**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/compare/3.0.0...3.0.1

## Другое

* Время запуска плагина было оптимизировано.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* Authorization fix and update: everything happens inside app now, without any cloud functions.

See, what's new in the 3.0.0 version: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/releases/tag/3.0.0-beta.1

releases.name: 3.0.0-beta.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Major 3.0.0 update

[ Текст на русском ниже ]

Version 3.0.0 of the plugin presents the biggest update since the beginning of development. The main change is migration from Bot API to User API with many enhancements. Now you can:

* Authorize into your Telegram account. No bot creation or any complex setup processes anymore!
* Post, using Telegram Premium features, if you have premium subscription. For example, send media attachments with text up to 4096 symbols (instead of 1024 with bots).
* Schedule posts in the advanced publishing settings. Just pick a date and send the post.
* If you don't want to log in, using our server, you can use your own App and Hash IDs. Safety and trust are our priorities.
* Post to specific topics in groups. If topics option is enabled in the target group, the plugin will allow you to choose where to post.

## UI/UX enhancements

* Plugin UI was generally cleaned up and slightly restructured.
* New notifications that reflect posting process.
* New error notification when an attempt to publish is made, but the user is not logged in.
* New error notification when an attempt to update the post is made, but no text was changed.
* READMEs and user guide are updated to reflect all changes and new features.

## Other

* Locales are updated, corrected and cleaned up.
* Fixed a bug when video attachments were sent as GIFs.
* Fixed a bug when pre-written comments were not sent.
* Fixed a bug when "Media attachments below the text" feature didn't work.

Thanks to @egorgvo for his valuable backend contributions.
Thanks to @aevxofficial for the idea to add posting to group topics feature.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/compare/2.7.1...3.0.0-beta.1

---

## Глобальное обновление 3.0.0

Версия плагина 3.0.0 представляет собой крупнейшее обновление с начала разработки. Главное изменение заключается в миграции с Bot API на User API со многими улучшениями. Теперь вы можете:

* Авторизоваться в ваш Telegram-аккаунт. Больше никаких ботов и сложных процессов настройки!
* Постить, используя фичи Telegram Premium, если у вас есть премиум-подписка. Например, отправлять медиа-вложения с текстом до 4096 символов (вместо 1024, как было с ботами).
* Отправлять посты в отложенные в меню расширенной публикации. Просто выберите дату и отправьте пост.
* Если вы не хотите логиниться через наши сервера, вы можете использовать свои собственные App и Hash ID. Безопасность и доверие являются для нас приоритетами.
* Постить в определённые темы в группах. Если опция тем включена в целевой группе, плагин предложит вам выбрать, в какие из них сделать пост.

## UI/UX улучшения

* Интерфейс плагина был приведён в порядок и немного реструктурирован.
* Новые уведомления, отражающие процесс постинга.
* Новое уведомление об ошибке, когда делается попытка публикации без авторизации.
* Новое уведомление об ошибке, когда делается попытка обновить пост, но текст не был изменён.
* README-файлы и руководство пользователя были обновлены, чтобы отразить все изменения и новые функции.

## Другое

* Текст интерфейса и переводы были обновлены, подчищены и исправлены.
* Исправлен баг, когда видео-вложения отправлялись как GIF.
* Исправлен баг, когда заготовленные комментарии не отправлялись.
* Исправлен баг, когда функция "Вложения под текстом" не срабатывала.

Благодарность @egorgvo за его ценные бекенд-коммиты.
Спасибо @aevxofficial за идею добавить фичу постинга в темы групп.

**Полный лог изменений**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/compare/2.7.1...3.0.0-beta.1

releases.author: pan4ratte
releases.description:
## We're in the store now!🔥

First official release for Obsidian plugin store with some minor hotfixes.

Find the plugin in the store: https://community.obsidian.md/plugins/publish-to-telegram

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/compare/2.7.0...2.7.1

releases.author: pan4ratte
releases.description:
## What's new

* New feature: Split text with `%% \split %%` or `<!-- \split -->` commands. When used, the contents of the note are published as separate posts.
* UX enhancement: Error messages if symbol limit is reached when posting.
* Documentation updates and corrections.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/compare/2.6.0...2.7.0

releases.author: pan4ratte
releases.description:
## What's new

* New major feature: Update already existing posts using the advanced publishing dialog.
* New feature: Support of the `%% ... %%` Obsidian comments syntax. Everything inside `%% ... %%` or `<!-- ... -->` comments is not included to the posted message.
* Usage instructions updates to match new features.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/compare/2.5.0...2.6.0

releases.author: pan4ratte
releases.description:
## What's New

* New feature: Video attachments support.
* New feature: Markdown embeds support.
* New feature: External (web-links) file attachments support.
* Usage instructions update to match new features.

## Bug Fixes

* GIF's are now posted as animations, not static media.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/compare/2.4.0...2.5.0

releases.author: pan4ratte
releases.description:
## What's New

* New feature: option to treat .md embeds as comments. Now you can pre-write comments in separate notes, embed them to the published post and they will appear in the post discussion.
* New feature: option to automatically save links to the published posts to the note's properties. by @egorgvo in https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/pull/7
* UX enhancement: now you can use @username of the public channel when creating a new preset instead of the channel ID. by @egorgvo in https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/pull/9

## Other Changes

* Plugin file structure enhancements. by @egorgvo in https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/pull/5
* Extract text preparation into separate function. by @egorgvo in https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/pull/6

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/compare/2.3.0...2.4.0

releases.author: pan4ratte
releases.description:
## What's Changed

* Bug fix: When publishing, the plugin parses only those attachments that are embedded in the note.
* UX enhancement: Now you can store attachments in any folder, not only in the same folder as the note that is being published. 
* New feature: horizontal rules like `---` or `***` or `___` are now rendered as `───` by @egorgvo

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/compare/2.2.1...2.3.0

releases.author: pan4ratte
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add .idea (Pycharm project files) to .gitignore. by @egorgvo in https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/pull/2
* Fix: normalize spaces after list markers and numbered list. by @egorgvo in https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/pull/3


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/compare/2.2.0...2.2.1

releases.author: pan4ratte
releases.description:
## What's New
* Translations and UI text updates for clarity and consistency, including formatting instructions inside the plugin.
* New error message: When you try to post, but bot token or chat ID is not specified.
* UX enhancement: If you have only one preset in your database and it's not set as a default one, but you try send a post, that preset will be set as default and post will be made with it.
* Some UI enhancements.

## Bug Fixes
* Fix: removed extra space after quote sign by @egorgvo in https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/pull/1
* Memory leak fix.
* If you have frontmatter filled, it will not be included in the posted message anymore.

## New Contributors
* @egorgvo made their first contribution in https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/compare/2.1.0...2.2.0

releases.author: pan4ratte
releases.description:
# New features

* Added formatting instructions to the plugin settings.
* Also, you can open formatting instructions from the command palette.

# Other updates

* Updated translations.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/compare/2.0.0...2.1.0

releases.author: pan4ratte
releases.description:
# New features

* Advanced publishing settings window:

  * Post to multiple channels/groups at once.
  * Post without a sound notification.
  * Post with attachments under the text.

* Now you can attach not only media, but also documents to your post.
* Every saved preset becomes a command palette command.

# Other updates and improvements

* Full English translation of the plugin.
* Many UI text corrections for clarity and consistency.
* UX enhancements, such as new buttons that open bot pages directly from plugin settings.
* Some bug fixes.
* Added README, check for instructions and usage recommendations.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-publish-to-telegram/compare/1.0.0...2.0.0
